speaker: speaker2
text: Are you aware that you drove through a red light ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I apologize , but I didn't realize that I did .

speaker: speaker2
text: Weren't you taught that yellow means slow down , not speed up ?

speaker: speaker2
text: So , then why did you speed up ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I don't know what to tell you .

speaker: speaker2
text: I'm going to have to write you a ticket .

speaker: speaker2
text: Here you go . Don't do that again .
